data.name: Walker
data.description: Ignores difficult terrain. Can move and shoot Heavy weapons.

data.name: Flyer
data.description: Can only be hit on 6+ by non-AA weapons. Moves double speed.

data.name: Transport
data.description: Can carry X infantry models (specified in description).

data.name: Scout
data.description: Can deploy outside normal deployment zone.

data.name: Heavy Armor
data.description: Reduces AP by 1 (AP2 becomes AP1, etc.).

data.name: Droid
data.description: Immune to morale. Can be repaired by CIS engineer units.

data.name: Huge
data.description: Blocks line of sight. Can be targeted by any weapon regardless of range.

data.name: Artillery
data.description: Can shoot at targets not visible to the firer.

data.name: Stealth
data.description: Can only be hit on 6+ by non-thermal weapons.

data.name: AA
data.description: Can target flyers. Non-flyers can only target this unit with AA weapons.

data.name: Infantry
data.description: Can be deployed in transports. Can capture objectives.

data.name: Vehicle
data.description: Cannot capture objectives. Cannot be deployed in transports.

data.name: Shielded(2)
data.description: Reduces damage from all attacks by 2 (5 damage becomes 3, etc.).
